What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Bags of flour and sugar alongside a box of baking soda and chocolate chips are arranged on the counter with text overlays indicating measurements. A person wearing a grey hooded sweatshirt stands before an open white refrigerator containing various jars and bottles. The individual reaches inside to retrieve a yellow box of butter and a white Toblerone chocolate box. Two white eggs sit in a clear glass bowl on the surface.
